title: Slaptjips
excerpt: Ingredients and Method Cut as many peeled potatoes as you need into fingers and set aside. Heat enough oil in a pan or use a deep fryer. Fry the chips on a low heat for 10 minutes, drain and let cool. Just before you serve, get the oil quite hot and …
html:
Ingredients and Method

Cut as many peeled potatoes as you need into fingers and set aside.

Heat enough oil in a pan or use a deep fryer. Fry the chips on a low heat for 10 minutes, drain and let cool.

Just before you serve, get the oil quite hot and fry the chips again until golden brown.

Drain on kitchen paper and season with salt.

Easy!
